blended.narrative: Plattekill Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.1 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,997 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 54°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
